data.content: All child knots advanced. 6/7 children at ready_for_shipment, child 28b1 (tests) now at ready_for_implementation_review after rebasing branch knots-2412-acceptance-field on main (21bd738). Make sanity passes at 95.22% coverage, 707 tests green. Core Rust acceptance field fully implemented: schema, data model, events, CLI flags, prompt rendering, sync handlers, and comprehensive tests. Foolery knots-backend tests are out of scope for this repository.
